channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make a deal, as hunt goes on for missing US pilot
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump gives Iran 48-hour ultimatum
- What Donald Trump's 48-hour deadline means: All that can unfold in the next 2 days in US-Iran war
- Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make deal or face ‘Hell’
- Trump warns Iran has 48 hours to make deal or face "Hell"
- Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make a deal before 'all hell reigns', hunt goes on for US pilot
- Trump says Iran has 48 hours to make deal as search for US pilot continues
- Trump warns Iran has 48 hours to make deal or face "Hell"
- Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make deal or face ‘hell’
- Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make deal or face 'Hell'
- Iran has 48hrs to make deal or open Hormuz before 'hell will reign down': Trump
- Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make deal or face 'Hell'
- Trump's 48-hour warning to Iran as Hormuz Strait 'deadline' nears: 'Before all Hell...'
- Trump gives Iran 48 hours to make deal or face 'hell'
- Trump says Iran has 48 hours to make deal or open strait
- US President Donald Trump issues 48-hour ultimatum to Iran over Strait of Hormuz
- Urgent: Trump warns Iran has 48 hours to make deal or face "Hell"
- Flash: Trump warns Iran has 48 hours to make deal before "all Hell will reign down on them"
- Trump warns Iran: 'Time is running out' before ‘all hell’ rains down]]>

item.title: Downed planes spell new peril for Trump as Tehran hunts missing US pilot
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US and Iran race to find missing crew member from downed military plane
- A Search is Underway for a Downed U.S. Crew Member in Iran. Here’s What the Mission Could Entail
- Search continues for missing fighter jet crew member
- Downed plane raise stakes as Iran hunts missing US pilot
- Iran Shoots Down U.S. Fighter Jet, Setting Off American Search and Rescue
- Rescue team in Iran face 'harrowing and dangerous' search for US crew member
- Crashes, Ejections and a Frantic Search for a Missing Airman in Iran
- US special forces enter Iran to rescue downed airman
- US searches for crew member after fighter jet shot down over Iran
- US and Iran race to find missing downed pilot as Lebanon faces intense Israeli strikes
- Search for missing US crew member of downed fighter jet enters second day
- Middle East war day 35 as it happened: US launches rescue operation for plane’s missing crew member
- U.S. Presses Search For Missing Pilot As Iran Calls On Public To Find 'Enemy'
- As Iran downs US jets - did they find the second pilot? Here's the latest
- 'Capture US pilot alive': Iran announces $60K bounty for pilot after Tehran claims it downed F-15E
- LIVE UPDATES: Second American Plane Goes Down Near Iran, Pilot Rescued
- What we know so far about the search for missing US airman in Iran
- US presses search for a missing serviceman as Iran calls on public to find 'enemy pilot'
- Iran, U.S. forces undertake frantic search for missing pilot of downed American fighter jet, Tehran announces reward
- Downed Planes Raise New Perils For Trump As Tehran Hunts For Missing U.S. Pilot
- US presses search for a missing serviceman as Iran calls on public to find ‘enemy pilot’
- Iran hunts crew member of crashed United States jet after one reported rescued
- Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Forces Search for Missing Airman After Iran Downs Jet
- US special forces enter Iran to rescue downed airman
- Iran, US race to find crew member of crashed American fighter jet
- Downed planes spell new peril for Trump as Tehran hunts missing U.S. pilot
- Race against time to find F-15 crew in Iran, video shows US choppers on search operation under fire
- Iran, US race to find crew member of crashed American fighter jet
- Iran, US Race To Find Crew Member Of Crashed American Fighter Jet
- US, Iran race to recover crew after F-15 shot down
- Iran, US race to find crew member of crashed American fighter jet
- Iran downs two US warplanes as both sides race to find missing crew member
- Video: US aircraft search for pilots after fighter jet shot down in Iran
- Iran, US race to find crew member of crashed American fighter jet
- US-Israeli war on Iran day 36: Hunt for missing US pilot inside Iran
- Downed planes raise new perils for Trump as Tehran hunts for missing US pilot
- Video: US aircraft search for pilots after fighter jet shot down in Iran
- Iran war: Search on for missing crew member of downed US jet
- Iran-Israel war LIVE: Iran hunts crew member of crashed U.S. jet after one reported rescued
- Middle East crisis live: US and Iranian forces race to recover missing pilot from downed jet; Israel bombards Beirut
- US aircraft shot down as war in Iran escalates; one crew member missing
- US fighter jet shot down over Iran, search underway for crew member: US officials
- Iran hunts crew member of crashed US jet after one reported rescued]]>

item.description:

- At least 12 persons, including eight of one family, killed in Afghan quake
- 12 people, including eight members of same family, killed in Afghanistan earthquake
- Family of 8 left war-torn Iran for Afghanistan, where an earthquake killed them
- Death toll from Afghan quake rises, including 8 members of refugee family returned from Iran
- Death toll from Afghan quake rises, including 8 members of refugee family returned from Iran
- 5.8-magnitude quake kills 12, injures 4 in Afghanistan
- Afghanistan earthquake kills eight members of same family
- Afghanistan earthquake kills eight members of same family
- Afghanistan earthquake of magnitude 5.9 kills at least 8
- 5.8 Magnitude Quake Hits Afghanistan and Pakistan, Killing 8 in Afghanistan
- Eight killed as 5.8 magnitude earthquake hits Afghanistan
- Afghanistan hit by magnitude 5.9 earthquake, eight killed]]>
